recommendations.title: Anatomy of Hell
recommendations.overview: A woman employs a gay man to spend four nights at her house to watch her when she's "unwatchable".

recommendations.title: Romance
recommendations.overview: Frustrated by the lack of intimacy in her relationship, a young schoolteacher goes through a series of intimidating and often violent sexual partners.

recommendations.title: A Real Young Girl
recommendations.overview: Reluctantly, a sulky adolescent returns to her parents' house for yet another boring summer vacation, dabbling in desire and the art of desirability, eventually mixing reality with vision, caged fantasies with the fierce female sexuality.

recommendations.title: Fat Girl
recommendations.overview: Anaïs is twelve and bears the weight of the world on her shoulders. She watches her older sister, Elena, whom she both loves and hates. Elena is fifteen and devilishly beautiful. Neither more futile, nor more stupid than her younger sister, she canno

recommendations.title: Last Tango in Paris
recommendations.overview: A recently widowed American begins an anonymous sexual relationship with a young Parisian woman.

recommendations.title: Everything, Everything
recommendations.overview: A teenager who's lived a sheltered life because she's allergic to everything, falls for the boy who moves in next door.

recommendations.title: The Last Song
recommendations.overview: A drama centered on a rebellious girl who is sent to a Southern beach town for the summer to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of music, the estranged duo learn to reconnect.

recommendations.title: I Knew Her Well
recommendations.overview: A young woman from the Italian countryside experiences the dark side of the business after she moves to Rome to become a star.

recommendations.title: The Ideal Palace
recommendations.overview: Follows Joseph Ferdinand Chavel a French postman who built a palace in the French countryside over 33 years.

recommendations.title: Tini: The New Life of Violetta
recommendations.overview: A teen star ventures out to the Italian countryside for a summer and emerges a new artist.
